option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.image.*?> <?import javafx.scene.shape.*?> <?import javafx.geometry.Insets?>
<ScrollPane fx:controller="controllers.ProfileController" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" styleClass="profile-scroll" stylesheets="@../styles/profile.css">
<VBox styleClass="profile-root" spacing="0">
<!-- ══ HERO BANNER ══ --> <StackPane styleClass="profile-hero"> <Pane/>
<VBox alignment="CENTER"> <StackPane styleClass="avatar-ring-outer"> <Circle fx:id="avatarClip" radius="56" styleClass="avatar-ring-inner"/> <ImageView fx:id="profileAvatar" fitWidth="112" fitHeight="112" preserveRatio="true"/> <Circle radius="9" styleClass="online-badge" StackPane.alignment="BOTTOM_RIGHT" translateX="6" translateY="6"/> </StackPane> <VBox.margin><Insets top="56" bottom="0"/></VBox.margin> </VBox>
<Button fx:id="editPhotoBtn" text="✎" styleClass="edit-photo-btn" StackPane.alignment="TOP_RIGHT" onAction="#onEditPhoto"> <StackPane.margin><Insets top="16" right="24"/></StackPane.margin> </Button> </StackPane>
<!-- ══ NAME + META ══ --> <VBox styleClass="profile-identity" alignment="CENTER" spacing="6"> <Label fx:id="fullNameLabel" styleClass="profile-fullname" text="— —"/> <Label fx:id="roleLabel" styleClass="profile-role-badge" text="Artiste"/> <HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="20" styleClass="profile-meta-row"> <Label fx:id="villeLabel" styleClass="meta-chip" text=" —"/> <Label fx:id="emailLabel" styleClass="meta-chip" text="✉ —"/> <Label fx:id="telLabel" styleClass="meta-chip" text="☏ —"/> </HBox> </VBox>
<!-- ══ STATS ROW ══ --> <HBox styleClass="stats-row" spacing="0"> <VBox styleClass="stat-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" alignment="CENTER" spacing="4"> <Label fx:id="statOeuvres" styleClass="stat-number" text="0"/> <Label styleClass="stat-label" text="Œuvres"/> </VBox> <Separator orientation="VERTICAL" styleClass="stat-sep"/> <VBox styleClass="stat-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" alignment="CENTER" spacing="4"> <Label fx:id="statDays" styleClass="stat-number" text="0"/> <Label styleClass="stat-label" text="Jours membre"/> </VBox> <Separator orientation="VERTICAL" styleClass="stat-sep"/> <VBox styleClass="stat-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" alignment="CENTER" spacing="4"> <Label fx:id="statStatut" styleClass="stat-number stat-statut" text="Actif"/> <Label styleClass="stat-label" text="Statut"/> </VBox> </HBox>
<!-- ══ CONTENT GRID ══ --> <HBox styleClass="profile-content-grid" spacing="24"> <HBox.margin><Insets top="0" right="40" bottom="40" left="40"/></HBox.margin>
<!-- LEFT column --> <VBox spacing="20" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <VBox styleClass="info-card"> <Label styleClass="card-section-title" text="BIOGRAPHIE"/> <Label fx:id="bioLabel" styleClass="card-body-text" text="—" wrapText="true"/> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="info-card"> <Label styleClass="card-section-title" text="CENTRES D'INTÉRÊT"/> <FlowPane fx:id="interetsPane" styleClass="tags-pane" hgap="8" vgap="8"/> </VBox> </VBox>
<!-- RIGHT column --> <VBox spacing="20" prefWidth="300" minWidth="260"> <VBox styleClass="info-card"> <Label styleClass="card-section-title" text="INFORMATIONS"/> <GridPane styleClass="info-grid" hgap="12" vgap="10"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints minWidth="90" prefWidth="90"/> <ColumnConstraints minWidth="140" prefWidth="140" hgrow="ALWAYS"/> </columnConstraints>
<Label styleClass="info-key" text="Prénom" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="0"/> <Label fx:id="prenomVal" styleClass="info-val" text="—" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="0"/>
<Label styleClass="info-key" text="Nom" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="1"/> <Label fx:id="nomVal" styleClass="info-val" text="—" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="1"/>
<Label styleClass="info-key" text="Naissance" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="2"/> <Label fx:id="naissanceVal" styleClass="info-val" text="—" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="2"/>
<Label styleClass="info-key" text="Inscription" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="3"/> <Label fx:id="inscriptionVal" styleClass="info-val" text="—" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="3"/>
<Label styleClass="info-key" text="Spécialité" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="4"/> <Label fx:id="specialiteVal" styleClass="info-val" text="—" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="4"/> </GridPane> </VBox>
<Button fx:id="editProfileBtn" text="MODIFIER LE PROFIL" styleClass="btn-edit-profile" maxWidth="Infinity" onAction="#onEditProfile"/> </VBox> </HBox>
</VBox> </ScrollPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.image.*?> <?import javafx.scene.shape.*?> <?import javafx.geometry.Insets?>
<ScrollPane fx:controller="controllers.ProfileController" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" styleClass="profile-scroll" stylesheets="@../styles/profile.css">
<VBox styleClass="profile-root" spacing="0">
<!-- ══ HERO BANNER ══ --> <StackPane styleClass="profile-hero"> <Pane/>
<VBox alignment="CENTER"> <StackPane styleClass="avatar-ring-outer"> <Circle radius="56" styleClass="avatar-ring-inner"/> <ImageView fx:id="profileAvatar" fitWidth="112" fitHeight="112" preserveRatio="true"/> <Circle radius="9" styleClass="online-badge" StackPane.alignment="BOTTOM_RIGHT" translateX="6" translateY="6"/> </StackPane> <VBox.margin><Insets top="56"/></VBox.margin> </VBox>
<Button fx:id="editPhotoBtn" text="✎" styleClass="edit-photo-btn" StackPane.alignment="TOP_RIGHT" onAction="#onEditPhoto"> <StackPane.margin><Insets top="16" right="24"/></StackPane.margin> </Button> </StackPane>
<!-- ══ NAME + META ══ --> <VBox styleClass="profile-identity" alignment="CENTER" spacing="6"> <Label fx:id="fullNameLabel" styleClass="profile-fullname" text="— —"/> <Label fx:id="roleLabel" styleClass="profile-role-badge" text="Artiste"/> <HBox alignment="CENTER" spacing="20" styleClass="profile-meta-row"> <Label fx:id="villeLabel" styleClass="meta-chip" text=" —"/> <Label fx:id="emailLabel" styleClass="meta-chip" text="✉ —"/> <Label fx:id="telLabel" styleClass="meta-chip" text="☏ —"/> </HBox> </VBox>
<!-- ══ STATS ROW ══ --> <HBox styleClass="stats-row" spacing="0"> <VBox styleClass="stat-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" alignment="CENTER" spacing="4"> <Label fx:id="statOeuvres" styleClass="stat-number" text="0"/> <Label styleClass="stat-label" text="Œuvres"/> </VBox> <Separator orientation="VERTICAL" styleClass="stat-sep"/> <VBox styleClass="stat-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" alignment="CENTER" spacing="4"> <Label fx:id="statDays" styleClass="stat-number" text="0"/> <Label styleClass="stat-label" text="Jours membre"/> </VBox> <Separator orientation="VERTICAL" styleClass="stat-sep"/> <VBox styleClass="stat-card" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" alignment="CENTER" spacing="4"> <Label fx:id="statStatut" styleClass="stat-number stat-statut" text="Actif"/> <Label styleClass="stat-label" text="Statut"/> </VBox> </HBox>
<!-- ══ CONTENT GRID ══ --> <HBox styleClass="profile-content-grid" spacing="24"> <HBox.margin><Insets top="0" right="40" bottom="40" left="40"/></HBox.margin>
<!-- LEFT column --> <VBox spacing="20" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <VBox styleClass="info-card"> <Label styleClass="card-section-title" text="BIOGRAPHIE"/> <Label fx:id="bioLabel" styleClass="card-body-text" text="—" wrapText="true"/> </VBox> <VBox styleClass="info-card"> <Label styleClass="card-section-title" text="CENTRES D'INTÉRÊT"/> <FlowPane fx:id="interetsPane" styleClass="tags-pane" hgap="8" vgap="8"/> </VBox> </VBox>
<!-- RIGHT column --> <VBox spacing="20" prefWidth="300" minWidth="260"> <VBox styleClass="info-card"> <Label styleClass="card-section-title" text="INFORMATIONS"/> <GridPane styleClass="info-grid" hgap="12" vgap="10"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints minWidth="90" prefWidth="90"/> <ColumnConstraints minWidth="140" prefWidth="140" hgrow="ALWAYS"/> </columnConstraints>
<Label styleClass="info-key" text="Prénom" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="0"/> <Label fx:id="prenomVal" styleClass="info-val" text="—" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="0"/>
<Label styleClass="info-key" text="Nom" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="1"/> <Label fx:id="nomVal" styleClass="info-val" text="—" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="1"/>
<Label styleClass="info-key" text="Naissance" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="2"/> <Label fx:id="naissanceVal" styleClass="info-val" text="—" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="2"/>
<Label styleClass="info-key" text="Inscription" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="3"/> <Label fx:id="inscriptionVal" styleClass="info-val" text="—" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="3"/>
<Label styleClass="info-key" text="Spécialité" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="4"/> <Label fx:id="specialiteVal" styleClass="info-val" text="—" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="4"/> </GridPane> </VBox>
<Button fx:id="editProfileBtn" text="MODIFIER LE PROFIL" styleClass="btn-edit-profile" maxWidth="Infinity" onAction="#onEditProfile"/> </VBox> </HBox>
</VBox> </ScrollPane>

option.name: updatedContent
